title: Forensic Reconstruction, Migration, and Approval-Context Portability
description: Reconstruct every governed mutation, enforce authorized migration, and prove clean-room portability and adapter parity without allowing TEST authority or evidence to escalate into PRODUCTION.
acceptance_criteria: Every canonical creation, transition, revocation, interpretation package, model-use publication, receipt, rollback, recovery, and approval consumption is reconstructable
Import and migration preserve execution context, approval identity, hashes, scope, authority, validity, consumption, and receipt lineage
TEST approvals, receipts, provenance, and adapter capabilities cannot be relabeled, transformed, or recovered as PRODUCTION
Schema-version, privilege-escalation, corrupt-input, stale-input, unsupported-migration, and cross-context replay fixtures fail closed
Clean-room offline bootstrap, import, verification, operation, export, rollback, and disaster-recovery exercises pass
Filesystem and GitHub adapters exhibit equivalent transaction, approval, idempotency, recovery, receipt, and audit behavior
